title: Bio-Regeneration heals 30 HP on equip

card.rawText: Can only be equipped to a creature with 9 or less remaining HP. Heal 30 HP. 2x Hit Roll results for this creature. 2x Atk Damage for this creature.

plan.title: Bio-Regeneration heals 30 HP on equip
plan.summary: Equip Bio-Regeneration to a creature at 5 HP and verify the on-equip heal restores 30 HP.

notes: Set player_1 primary current hp to 5 before Bio-Regeneration resolves.
Can only be equipped to a creature with 9 or less remaining HP.

steps: Set player_1 primary creature current HP to 5.
Verify the immediate 30 HP heal resolved.

expectedAssertions.label: Equipped creature receives the 30 HP heal

manualVerification: Verify against card text: Can only be equipped to a creature with 9 or less remaining HP. Heal 30 HP. 2x Hit Roll results for this creature. 2x Atk Damage for this creature.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the headless expected-success route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_009_bio_regeneration-009-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
